All
Getting started
Earnings
Devices
Payments
Technical
Why $1 KYC-Express?
What networks can I withdraw on?
Why is my withdrawal still 'Processing'?
Ask NexionBot
Hi, I'm NexionBot — I can answer most common questions in seconds. Tap a topic above or type below.
Type your question…
Contact support
Average response time · 24h via email
Open ticket

About KYC-Express
IDENTITY VERIFICATION
KYC-Express · 90 seconds, one time, never again.
A short ID check that lifts your $100 withdrawal cap, unlocks faster payouts, and keeps your account compliant with FATF/MiCA rules.
WHEN IT TRIGGERS
KYC-Express is required only at these specific thresholds — most users hit it on their first large withdrawal.
Lifetime exchange > $100
Cumulative NEX↔USDT conversion crosses $100 (per regulator rules).
Single withdrawal > $100
Any USDT withdrawal request above $100 in one go.
Region escalation
Some countries require verification regardless of amount; we'll prompt early.
Risk-flag review
Rare — unusual login pattern, device change, or compliance audit.
WHAT YOU PROVIDE
1
Full legal name
As shown on your government ID. Must match the document photo.
2
Government ID photo
Passport, national ID, or driver's license — front side, well-lit.
3
Liveness selfie
30-second face scan to match the document photo. We do not store the raw video.
WHAT WE NEVER ASK FOR
🚫
Social Security Number
We are not a US bank. SSN is never required and we will never ask.
🚫
Bank login / passwords
All payouts are wallet-to-wallet. We never need your bank credentials.
🚫
Family member info
KYC-Express verifies you, not your relatives.
WHAT YOU UNLOCK
💸
Withdrawal cap lifted
From $100 → up to $50,000 per day after verification.
⚡
Same-day payout
Verified accounts skip the 24h hold and pay out within 30 minutes.
🛡
Compliance shield
Locked from regulator freeze actions — you're cleared.
🏆
+10 contribution points
Completion bonus credited automatically — counts toward future withdrawals.
PARTNERS · COMPLIANCE
Sumsub
Tier-1 KYC provider used by Binance, Bybit, Crypto.com. SOC 2 Type II audited.
GDPR + MiCA
Data stored in EU region; right-to-erasure honored on request.
Encrypted at rest
Document images held in zero-knowledge encrypted blob storage. Nexion staff cannot decrypt.
FAQ
How long until I'm verified?
Median 7 minutes, max 24 hours. Most users complete the live selfie portion in under 90 seconds.
What if my document is in another language?
Sumsub supports 138 countries / 5,000+ ID types. Latin/Cyrillic/Arabic/CJK all accepted.
Can I withdraw without verification?
Yes — up to $100 cumulative without KYC. Withdrawals beyond that require KYC-Express.
What if I'm rejected?
We'll show the exact reason (blurry photo, expired doc, etc.) and let you retry up to 5 times in 24 hours.
Start KYC-Express
Free · ~90 seconds · powered by Sumsub

fixedTexts:
REQUIRED READING
Read this before staking, locking, or withdrawing.
Nexion is a smart-contract-based compute marketplace with token rewards. Returns are projections, not guarantees. Read the 7 sections below and acknowledge to continue.
01
Earnings projections are forecasts, not promises
All daily / monthly / annual yield estimates shown on Nexion are based on current network parameters and recent client demand. Actual earnings will fluctuate ±15% week-to-week and may degrade as more devices join the network or as compute prices fall. Past performance is not indicative of future results.
02
Hardware depreciates — efficiency falls over time
NexionBox / NexionRack hardware gradually loses effective output over its first year, with the decline steepening in the later months, so a device retains only a fraction of its original output by year-end. This degradation reflects real GPU thermal wear + driver bit-rot + network-difficulty inflation. Trade-in credit recovers a portion of the remaining-efficiency-weighted price.
03
Token (NEX) market risk
NEX is a platform reward token. Its USD-denominated value can move ±20% daily based on AI inference demand, buyback flow, and broader crypto market conditions. Token holdings are not FDIC / SIPC insured. Do not stake or hold more NEX than you can afford to lose.
04
Withdrawal windows + compliance review
Standard withdrawals settle in 30 days from request to wallet. Amounts over $1,000 may enter an enhanced compliance review window of 45 days during periods of elevated regulatory scrutiny. Withdrawals require contribution-point clearance (10-20 points per $100 withdrawn) which can be earned through daily check-ins, re-investment, and referral activity.
05
Staking lock-ups are irreversible
Staking pools (30d / 90d / 180d / 365d) lock principal for the full term. Early unlock forfeits 100% of accrued yield premium and may apply a 5-15% principal penalty depending on tier. NEX v2 Founders Vault locks for 24 months — read its terms separately before locking.
06
Network economics + referral compensation
Direct Royalty (10% of qualifying friend orders at base rate, scaled by Rate Tier) and Network Yield Bonus (algorithmic extended-network yield) are paid from platform margin, not from the friend's pocket. Referral rewards depend on referred users completing qualifying actions. Mass-recruitment or spam referrals will be voided and may result in account suspension.
07
Custody, KYC, and regulatory jurisdiction
Nexion is operated by Nexion Compliance Authority under FinCEN MSB registration #MSB1234567, with MiCA-aligned compliance procedures and Chainalysis KYT integration. Funds are held in segregated reserve accounts audited quarterly by PwC. KYC is required for withdrawals exceeding lifetime $100. Nexion is not available in OFAC-sanctioned jurisdictions.
Please scroll through all sections before acknowledging.
I have read the 7 sections above and understand that earnings are projections, hardware depreciates, tokens carry market risk, and withdrawals may be subject to compliance review.
I acknowledge — continue

fixedTexts:
REQUIRED READING
Read this before staking, locking, or withdrawing.
Nexion is a smart-contract-based compute marketplace with token rewards. Returns are projections, not guarantees. Read the 7 sections below and acknowledge to continue.
01
Earnings projections are forecasts, not promises
All daily / monthly / annual yield estimates shown on Nexion are based on current network parameters and recent client demand. Actual earnings will fluctuate ±15% week-to-week and may degrade as more devices join the network or as compute prices fall. Past performance is not indicative of future results.
02
Hardware depreciates — efficiency falls over time
NexionBox / NexionRack hardware gradually loses effective output over its first year, with the decline steepening in the later months, so a device retains only a fraction of its original output by year-end. This degradation reflects real GPU thermal wear + driver bit-rot + network-difficulty inflation. Trade-in credit recovers a portion of the remaining-efficiency-weighted price.
03
Token (NEX) market risk
NEX is a platform reward token. Its USD-denominated value can move ±20% daily based on AI inference demand, buyback flow, and broader crypto market conditions. Token holdings are not FDIC / SIPC insured. Do not stake or hold more NEX than you can afford to lose.
04
Withdrawal windows + compliance review
Section 04 selected for review
Standard withdrawals settle in 30 days from request to wallet. Amounts over $1,000 may enter an enhanced compliance review window of 45 days during periods of elevated regulatory scrutiny. Withdrawals require contribution-point clearance (10-20 points per $100 withdrawn) which can be earned through daily check-ins, re-investment, and referral activity.
05
Staking lock-ups are irreversible
Staking pools (30d / 90d / 180d / 365d) lock principal for the full term. Early unlock forfeits 100% of accrued yield premium and may apply a 5-15% principal penalty depending on tier. NEX v2 Founders Vault locks for 24 months — read its terms separately before locking.
06
Network economics + referral compensation
Direct Royalty (10% of qualifying friend orders at base rate, scaled by Rate Tier) and Network Yield Bonus (algorithmic extended-network yield) are paid from platform margin, not from the friend's pocket. Referral rewards depend on referred users completing qualifying actions. Mass-recruitment or spam referrals will be voided and may result in account suspension.
07
Custody, KYC, and regulatory jurisdiction
Nexion is operated by Nexion Compliance Authority under FinCEN MSB registration #MSB1234567, with MiCA-aligned compliance procedures and Chainalysis KYT integration. Funds are held in segregated reserve accounts audited quarterly by PwC. KYC is required for withdrawals exceeding lifetime $100. Nexion is not available in OFAC-sanctioned jurisdictions.
Please scroll through all sections before acknowledging.
I have read the 7 sections above and understand that earnings are projections, hardware depreciates, tokens carry market risk, and withdrawals may be subject to compliance review.
I acknowledge — continue
Acknowledgment is logged with timestamp. Re-reading is available anytime via Me → Risk disclosure.
